harness_criteria.description: The comparison baseline should be clean so diff and finding evidence point to the injected incident.
harness_criteria.name: baseline_starts_clean

harness_criteria.description: The complex fixture should trigger every expected Waterflow defect family.
harness_criteria.name: expected_incident_codes_detected

harness_criteria.description: The incident should create a realistic changed-path surface, not just a static bad snapshot.
harness_criteria.name: diff_contains_added_removed_changed_paths

harness_criteria.description: The incident validation plan should record one pass, one failing command, and one timeout.
harness_criteria.name: validation_failures_are_captured

harness_criteria.description: The route index should collapse the incident into route families with a high-risk summary.
harness_criteria.name: route_index_prioritizes_repair_surface

harness_criteria.description: Broken incident fixtures must stay inside the generated incident run directory.
harness_criteria.name: fixtures_are_isolated

incident_philosophy.isolation: The broken fixture is generated under outputs/shared/waterflow/incidents and is not part of the real lab source graph.
incident_philosophy.pass_definition: An incident pass means the intentionally broken fixture was detected and reported with actionable evidence; it does not mean the fixture or the real lab is repaired.
incident_philosophy.purpose: Exercise the full Waterflow incident loop: inject a realistic multi-route failure, detect it, capture failing command evidence, and produce a handoff for Codex or Claude.

repair_order.reason: Codex and Claude cannot route work reliably while core surfaces, agent metadata, or skill entrypoints are broken.
repair_order.title: Restore hard blockers first

repair_order.reason: Duplicate names make delegation nondeterministic and can send repair work to the wrong route.
repair_order.title: Remove ambiguous routing

repair_order.reason: After routing is unblocked, make commands runnable, remove cross-boundary leakage, and replace claims with evidence.
repair_order.title: Repair execution and boundary evidence

repair_order.reason: Re-run the incident harness, unit tests, and the normal Waterflow scan before claiming repair completion.
repair_order.title: Run the smallest verification spine
